title: lithospermum flexuosum
intro: Lithospermum flexuosum, also known as flexuous gromwell or flexible gromwell, is a plant species in the borage family that is native to Europe and parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which have been attributed to its alkaloid and flavonoid content. The health benefits of Lithospermum flexuosum are said to include reducing inflammation and improving immune function, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and antiviral properties. Lithospermum flexuosum can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as dried roots, leaves, and flowers, and is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures.
